Headline: #37 Sedgwick Temporary Southbound Reroute near Van Buren/Wacker
ShortDescription: SB 37 Sedgwick buses are temporarily rerouted via Wells, Van Buren, Wacker, Adams, Clinton and over normal route: due to, street blockage near Van Buren/Wacker

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #37 Sedgwick buses are temporarily rerouted via Wells, Van Buren, Wacker, Adams, Clinton and over normal route: due to, street blockage near Van Buren/Wacker.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
